sections.heading: 1. Booking & Confirmation
sections.content: All reservations are treated as enquiries until confirmed in writing by SeaZen. A booking is only confirmed upon receipt of the agreed deposit. SeaZen reserves the right to decline any booking request.

sections.heading: 2. Payment
sections.content: A deposit of 30% of the total rental fee is due within 7 days of confirmation. The remaining balance is due 60 days before the arrival date. Payment methods: bank transfer or credit card (processing fees may apply).

sections.heading: 3. Minimum Stay
sections.content: A minimum stay of 3 nights applies during standard periods. A minimum of 7 nights applies during high season (July, August, and public holidays). Shorter stays may be available on request.

sections.heading: 4. Guest Responsibilities
sections.content: Guests are responsible for the property and its contents during their stay. Any damage beyond normal wear and tear will be charged to the guest. The property is non-smoking. Pets are permitted only with prior written consent.

sections.heading: 5. Occupancy
sections.content: The maximum occupancy stated in the property listing must not be exceeded. Unauthorised guests or events are strictly prohibited.

sections.heading: 6. Check-in & Check-out
sections.content: Check-in: from 16:00. Check-out: by 11:00. Early check-in and late check-out may be arranged subject to availability.

sections.heading: 7. Liability
sections.content: SeaZen shall not be liable for any loss, injury, or damage to persons or property during the rental period. Guests are advised to arrange appropriate travel and personal insurance.

sections.heading: 8. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of Spain. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Catalonia.
